profile: cargo test dev profile, optimized dev settings from Cargo.toml

correctness.project_overview: cached JSON equaled direct project_overview_json output before timing and after the cached loop
correctness.list_issues: cached JSON equaled direct list_issues_json output before timing and after the cached loop

correctness.freshness: unit tests cover stable cache hits, JSONL witness mismatch rejection, mutation cache clearing, tool-level stale-count invalidation, and show_issue stale-title invalidation
